title: hypericum virginicum subsp. tubulosum
intro: Hypericum virginicum subsp. tubulosum, also known as the woodland St. John's Wort or spotted St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hypericum virginicum subsp. tubulosum include its potential to alleviate anxiety and depression, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine.
